name: fm-agent-plugin
description: Plugin for using FM-Agent framework with fully automated reasoning for large-scale systems

interface.shortDescription: Run FM-Agent reasoning, diagnosis, and repair workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: FM-Agent integrates automated reasoning for large-scale systems into Codex through reusable skills for installation, configuration, full-project analysis, diagnosis, and verification-guided repair loops.
defaultPrompt: Run FM-Agent analysis on this project.
